title: Validation Engineers
description: Design or plan protocols for equipment or processes to produce products meeting internal and external purity, safety, and quality requirements.

tasks.text: Study product characteristics or customer requirements to determine validation objectives and standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze validation test data to determine whether systems or processes have met validation criteria or to identify root causes of production problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop validation master plans, process flow diagrams, test cases, or standard operating procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare detailed reports or design statements, based on results of validation and qualification tests or reviews of procedures and protocols.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain validation test equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct validation or qualification tests of new or existing processes, equipment, or software in accordance with internal protocols or external standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate with regulatory agencies regarding compliance documentation or validation results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare, maintain, or review validation and compliance documentation, such as engineering change notices, schematics, or protocols.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Recommend resolution of identified deviations from established product or process standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design validation study features, such as sampling, testing, or analytical methodologies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare validation or performance qualification protocols for new or modified manufacturing processes, systems, or equipment for production of pharmaceuticals, electronics, or other products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create, populate, or maintain databases for tracking validation activities, test results, or validated systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Resolve testing problems by modifying testing methods or revising test objectives and standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct audits of validation or performance qualification processes to ensure compliance with internal or regulatory requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Draw samples of raw materials, intermediate products, or finished products for validation testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct validation activities, such as protocol creation or testing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate the implementation or scheduling of validation testing with affected departments and personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in internal or external training programs to maintain knowledge of validation principles, industry trends, or novel technologies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Validate or characterize sustainable or environmentally friendly products, using electronic testing platforms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist in training equipment operators or other staff on validation protocols and standard operating procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Devise automated lab validation test stations or other test fixtures or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
